int_03_machinery_purchase.reason: Machinery Dr $800,000 / AP Cr $700,000 / Cash Cr $100,000 matches expected. Machinery = PP&E Machinery synonym.

int_04_major_overhaul.reason: Machinery Dr $200,000 / Cash Cr $200,000 matches expected.

int_05_bond_issuance_discount.reason: Cash Dr $2,657,205 / Discount on Bonds Payable Dr $342,795 / Bonds Payable Cr $3,000,000. Expected Cash $2,657,510 / Discount $342,490. Amounts differ by ~$305 which is within the ~$1,000 PV rounding tolerance.

int_06_warranty_provision.reason: Warranty Expense Dr $900,000 / Warranty Liability Cr $900,000 matches expected. Warranty Liability = Provision for warranties synonym.

int_07_decommissioning_provision.reason: Marine Structure Dr $4,000,000 + Dr $1,950,000 / AP Cr $4,000,000 / ARO Cr $1,950,000. int_08_share_repurchase_cancel.reason: Common Shares Dr $50,000 / Retained Earnings Dr $10,000 / Cash Cr $60,000 matches expected. Common Shares = Share capital synonym.

int_09_merchandise_with_costs.reason: Inventory Dr $1,150,000 / Warehouse Storage Expense Dr $20,000 / Freight Out Expense Dr $50,000 / AP Cr $1,000,000 / Cash Cr $220,000 matches expected. Warehouse Storage = Warehousing expense, Freight Out = Distribution costs synonyms.

int_10_prepayment.reason: Prepaid Expenses Dr $1,000,000 / Cash Cr $1,000,000 matches expected. Prepaid Expenses = Prepayments synonym.

int_11_land_instalment_discount.reason: Land Dr $49,173,000 / Note Payable Cr $49,173,000. Expected Land Dr $49,173,000 / Discount on long-term payables Dr $10,827,000 / Long-term payables Cr $60,000,000. int_12_site_improvements.reason: Land Improvements Dr $1,750,000 + Dr $2,360,000 / Cash Cr $1,750,000 / Bank Cr $2,360,000. Expected PP&E Site improvements Dr $1,750,000 / Land Dr $2,360,000. int_13_donation_note.reason: Charitable Contributions Expense Dr $1,000,000 / Notes Payable Cr $1,000,000 matches expected. Charitable Contributions = Donations expense synonym.

int_14_vehicle_mixed_payment.reason: Vehicles Dr $40,000 / Cash Cr $20,000 / Notes Payable Cr $20,000 matches expected. Vehicles = PP&E Vehicles synonym.

int_15_bank_loan.reason: Cash Dr $200,000 / Bank Loan Payable Cr $200,000 matches expected. Bank Loan Payable = Long-term borrowings synonym.

int_17_customer_deposit.reason: Cash Dr $5,000 / Unearned Revenue Cr $5,000 matches expected. Cash = Cash chequing, Unearned Revenue = Contract liabilities synonyms.

int_18_multiple_assets.reason: Office Equipment Dr $2,000 / Computer Equipment Dr $3,500 / Vehicles Dr $250,000 / Cash Cr $5,500 / AP Cr $250,000. int_20_service_revenue_credit.reason: Accounts Receivable Dr $31,500 / Service Revenue Cr $31,500 matches expected. AR = Trade receivables synonym.

int_23_split_electricity.reason: Manufacturing Overhead Dr $15,000 / Utilities Expense Dr $5,500 / Credit Card Payable Cr $20,500 matches expected. Manufacturing Overhead = WIP Manufacturing overhead synonym.

int_24_advertising.reason: Advertising Expense Dr $19,469.03 / HST Receivable Dr $2,530.97 / Cash Cr $22,000. Expected Advertising expense Dr $22,000 / Cash Cr $22,000. int_25_building_purchase_allocation.reason: Land Dr $6,000,000 / Building Dr $3,000,000 / Sales Tax Receivable Dr $450,000 / AP Cr $4,500,000 / Cash Cr $4,950,000. int_26a_payroll_recognition.reason: WIP Inventory Dr $25,000 / Admin Salaries Dr $20,000 / Pension Cr $2,000 / Health Insurance Cr $3,250 / EI Cr $1,050 / Income Tax Cr $1,450 / Cash Cr $37,250. Expected 4 non-zero lines (WIP Dr $25,000 / Salaries Dr $20,000 / Statutory withholdings Cr $7,750 / Cash Cr $37,250). Actual has 7 non-zero lines. The 4 withholding sub-accounts split what should be a single Statutory withholdings payable line.

int_26b_payroll_remittance.reason: Pension Dr $4,000 / Health Insurance Dr $6,500 / EI Dr $2,100 / Income Tax Dr $1,450 / Cash Cr $14,050. Expected Statutory withholdings Dr $7,750 / Employee benefits expense Dr $6,300 / Cash Cr $14,050. Actual debits total $14,050 but are all liability reductions ($7,750 employee + $6,300 employer match). Missing the Employee benefits expense Dr $6,300 for employer match; instead treats all $14,050 as liability clearance.

int_28_promotional_literature.reason: Marketing and Promotional Expense Dr $7,000 / Cash Cr $7,000 matches expected. Marketing/Promotional = Advertising expense synonym.

int_29_security_deposit_received.reason: Cash Dr $25,000 / Security Deposit Payable Cr $25,000 matches expected. Security Deposit Payable = Rental deposits received synonym.

int_31_vehicle_nonrecoverable_tax.reason: Vehicles Dr $48,000 + Dr $4,800 / Loan Payable Cr $52,800. Expected PP&E Vehicles Dr $52,800 / Other payables Cr $52,800.
